name: help-scout
description: Read Help Scout mailboxes, conversations, and customers, and reply to or create support conversations

requiredApis.name: Help Scout My Apps OAuth application

envVars.name: HELPSCOUT_CLIENT_ID
envVars.description: Help Scout OAuth App ID (from My Apps)

envVars.name: HELPSCOUT_CLIENT_SECRET
envVars.description: Help Scout OAuth App Secret (from My Apps)

tools.name: List Mailboxes
tools.description: List Help Scout mailboxes (inboxes) so agents can find a mailbox ID before reading conversations

tools.name: List Conversations
tools.description: List Help Scout conversations, optionally filtered by mailbox, status, tag, or assignee

status.description: Filter by status: active (default), open, pending, closed, spam, or all

tag.description: Filter by tag name; comma-separate multiple tags

assigned_to.description: Filter by assigned Help Scout user ID

modifiedSince.description: Only return conversations modified after this ISO 8601 timestamp, e.g. 2026-05-04T12:00:03Z

sortField.description: Sort field, such as createdAt, modifiedAt, or number

tools.name: Get Conversation
tools.description: Get a Help Scout conversation by ID, including its message threads

embed.description: Sub-entities to include; set to threads to return the full message history

tools.name: List Customers
tools.description: List Help Scout customers, optionally filtered by mailbox, name, or a search query

sortField.description: Sort field, such as createdAt, modifiedAt, firstName, or lastName

tools.name: List Users
tools.description: List Help Scout users (team members) so agents can find user IDs for assignment and reply attribution

email.description: Look up a user by email address (exact match)

mailbox.description: Only return users with access to this mailbox (inbox) ID

tools.name: Add Note
tools.description: Add an internal note to a conversation - visible to the team only, never emailed to the customer

conversationId.description: Help Scout conversation ID to add the note to

user.description: ID of the Help Scout user adding the note (defaults to the authorizing user)

tools.name: Update Tags
tools.description: Replace the tag list of a conversation, e.g. to label it during triage. Send the full list: tags omitted from the payload are removed.

conversationId.description: Help Scout conversation ID to tag

tags.description: Complete list of tag names for the conversation, e.g. ["billing", "vip"]. New tags are created automatically; an empty array removes all tags.

tools.name: Reply to Conversation
tools.description: Send a reply on an existing Help Scout conversation, optionally changing its status

conversationId.description: Help Scout conversation ID to reply on

customer.description: Customer being replied to, identified by id or email, e.g. {"email":"user@example.com"}

user.description: ID of the Help Scout user sending the reply (defaults to the authorizing user)

status.description: Optionally set the conversation status after replying: active, open, pending, closed, or spam

draft.description: Create the reply as a draft instead of sending it

tools.name: Create Conversation
tools.description: Create a new Help Scout conversation in a mailbox with an initial thread

mailboxId.description: ID of the mailbox (inbox) to create the conversation in

type.description: Conversation type: email, chat, or phone

status.description: Conversation status: active, pending, or closed

customer.description: Customer the conversation is with, identified by id or email, e.g. {"email":"user@example.com"}

tags.description: Tags to apply to the conversation

assignTo.description: Help Scout user ID to assign the conversation to

autoReply.description: Send the mailbox auto-reply to the customer (requires a customer thread)

prompts.title: Triage the inbox
prompts.prompt: List active Help Scout conversations, group them by topic, and suggest which need attention first.

prompts.title: Draft replies
prompts.prompt: Read the latest open Help Scout conversations and draft suggested replies for each.

prompts.title: Customer history
prompts.prompt: Find a Help Scout customer by email and summarize their recent conversations.

SETUP_GUIDE.title: Help Scout setup

steps.title: Create a Help Scout account
steps.description: Sign up at https://www.helpscout.com/ — a free trial works for development. Create at least one Inbox (mailbox) so the API has data to return.

steps.title: Create an OAuth app
steps.description: In Help Scout, go to Your Profile > My Apps (sign in at https://secure.helpscout.net/) and choose Create My App. Set the Redirection URL to your app's callback URL (the /oauth/callback/help-scout path on your deployment).

steps.title: Copy the app credentials
steps.description: Copy the App ID into HELPSCOUT_CLIENT_ID and the App Secret into HELPSCOUT_CLIENT_SECRET.

steps.title: Connect and authorize
steps.description: Complete the OAuth flow with a Help Scout user who has access to the mailboxes you want agents to read. Access is granted at the app level — the Mailbox API does not use granular scopes.

notes: Access tokens expire after 2 days (172,800 seconds); the refresh token returned by the Authorization Code flow is used to obtain new ones automatically.
The Mailbox API has no scope system — the connected user's permissions determine which mailboxes and conversations are visible.
List endpoints return HAL+JSON with results under _embedded and page-based pagination via the page query parameter.
Replies sent via the API are delivered to the customer as real emails — use the draft flag while testing.
